channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Excessive Litter Amhurst Road, 20th June
item.description:
Excessive Litter on Amhurst Road, outside of residential homes where the council has put new seating but no bins. Residents are fed up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes to big, 20th June
item.description:
The bushes are so overgrown when you come down the road they are causing scratches along your car. If you. Are parked outside your house the cars avoid the bushes and end up causing damage to the parked cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Mead, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead squirrel, 20th June
item.description:
There is a dead squirrel lying in the gutter on the east side of Vanbrugh Fields, by houses 4&5. It is attracting crows.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Fields, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 20th June
item.description:
Already reported and said it was fixed but same amount of rubbish remains there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 20th June
item.description:
Fly tipping in same place as always

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Flytipping at side of Ellison house, service road to garages, 20th June
item.description:
Flytipping at side of Ellison house on service road to council garages. Fridge, barbecue, corrugated plastic sheet etc. Terrible case. Occurred last night or early am.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewisham Road, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, gated area, St Giles Churchyard., 20th June
item.description:
Litter bin in gated area of St Giles Churchyard overflowing with litter & bags of dog waste. Noticed bin was nearly full earlier this week. Litter & bags of dog waste now being left on top of bin, or thrown on ground near to bin which is unhygienic, & dangerous to dogs exercising in gated area & also wildlife. I litter picked this morning to clean up the area but had difficulty getting all litter & dog waste bags into the bin as it's full to the top. Bin in gated area needs emptying asap & on more frequent schedule to prevent ongoing issues with overflowing waste. As an FYI, there is also litter all over ground near bin in ungated area of churchyard too, so that likely also needs emptying.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded rubbish, 20th June
item.description:
Bags of rubbish which do not seem to belong to any household. The bin men won’t take them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newick Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike hanger damaged, exposing bikes to theives and blocked pavement, 20th June
item.description:
A incident occurred with a vechile accidently crashing into the bike hanger on Burcher Gale Grove. The bike hanger is now open, exposing the bikes to be easily stolen. The hanger also is stuck between the road and pavement, causing a street hazard. The issue has happened just 20 minutes ago from this incident report (20/06, 6:23PM)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daniel Gardens, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Used condoms disposed of by local person, 20th June
item.description:
A local has disposed of her used condoms in the bin by the local children's Plumstead Adventure Playcentre. They are visible in a full bin where children play. I have been advised to report this by the Plumstead Adventre Playcentre.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blendon Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again!!!!!!, 20th June
item.description:
Caught on camera this time. Male comes from Pointer close with rugs and dumps them on the side of my house. It seems male is on foot, no vehicle lights in the footage. Might live on that street. Do something!!!! This is tiring, the side of my house is not a dumpster!!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crossway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nuisance vehicel, 20th June
item.description:
Vehicle: a grey Audi S3 Sportback with no number plates displayed and no valid tax. What is happening: the vehicle has been kept at the entrance to the mews for months and is being dismantled and repaired here on an ongoing basis. The front end has been stripped, with the front bumper removed and the radiator and cooling fans exposed, and there is crash damage to the bonnet and front wing. Parts and a vehicle cover are regularly left around it, and the cover billows loose in the wind. Nuisance: the engine is run for long periods, which causes significant and prolonged noise disturbance that interferes with the use and enjoyment of my home. The stripped front end with exposed components, loose parts and fluids also presents a safety and environmental hazard in a shared residential space. This is well beyond any short term repair following a breakdown or accident. Request: please investigate this as a nuisance vehicle and take appropriate action to stop the repair activity and have the vehicle removed. Please confirm a reference number and keep me updated on progress.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bewick Mews, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 20th June
item.description:
Southend lane near 317. Please clear flypostering from bus sheltet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Lane, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)
